mapper.select: SELECT a.appeal_id AS appealId, a.appeal_employee_id AS appealEmployeeId, a.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_code AS employeeCode, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, d.department_name AS teamName, pd.department_name AS departmentName, a.appeal_type AS appealType, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.review_result AS reviewResult, qe1.score AS firstScore, qe2.score AS secondScore, qe1.eval_comment AS firstStageComment, qe2.eval_comment AS secondStageComment, COALESCE(qe2.score, qe1.score) AS finalScore, a.filed_at AS filedAt, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, at.attachment_id AS attachmentId, at.file_name AS fileName, at.file_size AS fileSize FROM evaluation_appeal a JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = a.appeal_employee_id JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id LEFT JOIN department d ON d.department_id = e.department_id LEFT JOIN department pd ON pd.department_id = d.parent_department_id LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe1 ON qe1.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe1.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe1.evaluation_level = 1 LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe2 ON qe2.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe2.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe2.evaluation_level = 2 LEFT JOIN attachment at ON at.file_group_id = a.file_group_id AND at.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.appeal_id = #{appealId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation_appeal a LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe3 ON qe3.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe3.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe3.evaluation_level = 3
AND a.status = #{status}

SELECT a.appeal_id AS appealId, a.appeal_employee_id AS appealEmployeeId, a.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_code AS employeeCode, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, d.department_name AS teamName, pd.department_name AS departmentName, a.appeal_type AS appealType, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.review_result AS reviewResult, qe1.score AS firstScore, qe2.score AS secondScore, COALESCE(qe2.score, qe1.score) AS finalScore, a.filed_at AS filedAt, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt FROM evaluation_appeal a JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = a.appeal_employee_id JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id LEFT JOIN department d ON d.department_id = e.department_id LEFT JOIN department pd ON pd.department_id = d.parent_department_id LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe1 ON qe1.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe1.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe1.evaluation_level = 1 LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe2 ON qe2.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe2.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe2.evaluation_level = 2 WHERE a.appeal_employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY a.filed_at DESC

SELECT a.appeal_id AS appealId, a.appeal_employee_id AS appealEmployeeId, a.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_code AS employeeCode, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, d.department_name AS teamName, pd.department_name AS departmentName, a.appeal_type AS appealType, a.title, a.content, a.status, a.review_result AS reviewResult, qe1.score AS firstScore, qe2.score AS secondScore, COALESCE(qe2.score, qe1.score) AS finalScore, a.filed_at AS filedAt, a.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt FROM evaluation_appeal a JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = a.appeal_employee_id JOIN employee reviewer ON reviewer.employee_id = #{reviewerId} JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id LEFT JOIN department d ON d.department_id = e.department_id LEFT JOIN department pd ON pd.department_id = d.parent_department_id JOIN qualitative_evaluation qer ON qer.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qer.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qer.evaluation_level = #{evaluationLevel} LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe1 ON qe1.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe1.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe1.evaluation_level = 1 LEFT JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe2 ON qe2.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe2.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe2.evaluation_level = 2 WHERE
e.department_id = reviewer.department_id
d.parent_department_id = reviewer.department_id
AND a.status IN
#{status}
ORDER BY CASE a.status WHEN 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 WHEN 'RECEIVING' THEN 1 WHEN 'REVIEWING' THEN 2 WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, a.filed_at DESC

SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM evaluation_appeal a JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = a.appeal_employee_id JOIN employee reviewer ON reviewer.employee_id = #{reviewerId} LEFT JOIN department d ON d.department_id = e.department_id JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe ON qe.evaluatee_id = a.appeal_employee_id AND qe.evaluation_period_id = a.evaluation_period_id AND qe.evaluation_level = #{evaluationLevel} WHERE a.appeal_id = #{appealId} AND
e.department_id = reviewer.department_id
d.parent_department_id = reviewer.department_id
)
